welcome.nativeTitle: Turn your vision into real follow-through
welcome.nativeDescription: Plot the life you are reshaping — choose your focus areas, build The Plan around your dates and goals, and let reminders keep you accountable.
pillars: Choose the areas of your life you are transforming
Turn dates, goals, and next steps into The Plan
Reminders that help you follow through

desire.title: Choose what you are transforming
desire.subtitle: Pick the focus areas you want to reshape first

makeYours.title: Plot your vision
makeYours.subtitle: Add images, notes, and structure that match where you are headed

listen.title: Follow through
listen.subtitle: Use The Plan and reminders to stay accountable to your goals

name.title: First things first — what should we call you?
name.saveError: Could not save your name. Check your connection and try again.

focusCategories.title: Choose your three focus boards
focusCategories.subtitle: Pick up to three. These become your starter focus boards alongside The Plan.

primaryIntent.title: What are you setting up?
primaryIntent.subtitle: Choose your starting system. You can add other boards later.

life_rebranding.title: Life plotting & vision boards
life_rebranding.description: Pick three focus areas and turn them into three starter boards plus The Plan.

home_organization.title: Home organization
home_organization.description: Build household boards for routines, zones, chores, meals, and resets.

office_work.title: Office & projects
office_work.description: Build project boards with Kanban, timelines, priorities, OKRs, and next steps.

moodboarding.title: Moodboarding
moodboarding.description: Build image-forward boards for interiors, style, travel, events, or brand direction.

homeFocus.title: What is your home focus?
homeFocus.subtitle: Pick the area you want your starter boards built around.

officePlanning.title: Choose your starting structure
officePlanning.subtitle: Pick the structure you want on your first board. You can add more later.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.description: Move tasks from To Do to Done.

eisenhower.title: Priority grid
eisenhower.description: Sort what matters now, next, later, or not at all.

okrs.title: OKRs
okrs.description: Set the goal and the results that show it is moving.

five_s.title: 5S reset
five_s.description: Reset a space or workflow step by step.

moodboardFocus.title: What is your moodboard for?
moodboardFocus.subtitle: We will start you with boards that match that direction.

focusDetails.subtitle: We will shape your starter boards around this.

toolPreference.subtitle: Choose the tool you are most likely to open again.

workspaceTemplate.title: Choose your first board setup
workspaceTemplate.subtitle: Pick a starting layout. You can rearrange everything later.

summary.title: Your starter boards
summary.subtitle: We'll create one focus board for each area you selected, plus The Plan.
summary.planDescription: Dates, goals, reminders, and next steps.

four-board-rebrand.description: Three focus boards and one plan board — the signature four-board plot.

home-plan-routines.description: Weekly rhythms, zones, and family flow.

home-seasonal-reset.description: Holiday, declutter, and seasonal home projects.

office-five-s.name: 5S Workplace
office-five-s.description: Lean floor discipline — Sort through Sustain.

guide.title: Choose a guide
guide.subtitle: An AI companion for questions while you rebrand.

reminderChannels.title: What kind of reminder helps you follow through?
reminderChannels.subtitle: Choose how Palette should remind you about dates, goals and next steps from The Plan.
reminderChannels.calendarTitle: I usually follow through when it is on my calendar
reminderChannels.calendarDescription: Best for appointments, deadlines and scheduled next steps.
reminderChannels.emailTitle: I need a reminder, but not a hard interruption
reminderChannels.emailDescription: Best for check-ins, weekly reviews and longer notes from The Plan.
reminderChannels.smsDescription: Best for the reminders you really do not want to miss.
reminderChannels.helper: Use text for your most important reminders. Use email or calendar for everything else.
reminderChannels.systemLine: Calendar = scheduled follow-through. Email = soft accountability. Text = stronger nudge.
reminderChannels.smsConsent: I agree to receive text reminders for dates, goals and next steps I create in Palette. Message and data rates may apply. I can turn text reminders off anytime.
reminderChannels.phoneHint: Used only for text reminders you choose.
reminderChannels.dailyLimit: Up to 5 text reminders per day.

attribution.title: How did you find Palette Plotting?
attribution.subtitle: This helps us understand what's working.

intensity.title: How often do you want check-ins?

titleByIntent.life_rebranding: How often do you want check-ins?
titleByIntent.moodboarding: How often do you want to plot?

intensity.subtitle: Set a rhythm for following through on The Plan. You can change this anytime.
intensity.notificationsQuestion: Send push nudges on your phone?
intensity.notificationsDescription: Optional in-app push for your daily rhythm. Email and calendar reminders work on web too.
intensity.notificationsHint: Optional in-app push for your daily rhythm. Email and calendar reminders work on web too.
intensity.customizeInSettings: You can change this anytime in Settings.

consistent.title: Consistent
consistent.description: Morning and evening nudges for your boards and The Plan.

lockedIn.title: Locked In
lockedIn.description: A stronger rhythm for active planning weeks.

tracking.title: Help us improve Palette Plotting (optional)
tracking.body: Palette Plotting uses app activity data to measure ad performance and improve experience. Will you help us improve Palette Plotting?

email.title: Save your plot
email.subtitle: Create your account to lock in your rebrand workspace. Everything saves to this email.
email.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
email.needFirstName: We need your first name from earlier in setup.
email.passwordLength: Please enter a password with at least 8 characters
email.acceptTerms: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
email.subscriptionError: Could not open subscription options. Try again in a moment.
email.signOutToChangeEmail: Sign out to use a different address.
email.signOutToChangeEmailToast: Sign out first to use a different email address.
email.signOutFailed: Could not sign out. Try again.
email.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Enter your email and password again.
email.emailMarketingConsent: Send me rebrand tips and updates. By checking this box, you consent to marketing communications. You can opt out anytime.

plotSynthesis.title: Your workspace is ready.
plotSynthesis.subtitle: Your starter boards, The Plan, extraction tools, and reminders are set up.

items.workspace: Your focus boards match the areas you selected.
items.boards: The Plan is where dates, goals, and next steps become reminders.
items.tracking: Use extraction to pull text, dates, and action items from boards and images.

row1.quote: Finally feels like my moodboard came to life.
row1.author: Jordan M.

row1.quote: I stopped doom-scrolling and started plotting my era.
row1.author: Riley T.

row1.quote: The aesthetic + plan combo is exactly what I needed.
row1.author: Casey L.

row1.quote: My rebrand actually looks like me now.
row1.author: Morgan P.

row2.quote: Seeing it all in one place changed how I show up.
row2.author: Dev S.

row2.quote: Reminders on my plotted goals keep me honest.
row2.author: Avery K.

row2.quote: Small daily wins on the plan board add up fast.
row2.author: Quinn R.

row2.quote: I open this more than any other app on my phone.
row2.author: Jamie H.
